sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64646" key="makro/hlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρό-ηλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n64646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with long nails</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
